song.title: Worthy is the Lamb
song.presentation: V1 V2 C V1 V2 C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Thank You for the cross, Lord, Thank You for the price You paid; Bearing all my sin and shame, In love You came And gave amazing grace
[V2] 2) Thank you for this love, Lord; Thank You Lord for saving me; Washed me in Your cleansing flow And now I know The warmth of your embrace
[C] Chorus Worthy is the Lamb Seated on the throne; Crown Him now with many crowns, Exalt His name alone|| High and lifted up, Jesus, Son of God, The Lord of heaven crucified; Worthy is the Lamb; Worthy is the Lamb
[E] 1) Thank You for the cross, Lord, Thank You for the price You paid; Bearing all my sin and shame, In love You came And gave amazing grace
2) Thank you for this love, Lord; Thank You, Lord, for saving me; Washed me in Your cleansing flow And now I know Your forgiveness and embrace
Chorus Worthy is the Lamb Seated on the throne; Crown Him now with many crowns, Exalt His name alone; High and lifted up, Jesus, Son of God, The Lord of Heaven crucified; Worthy is the Lamb
